'''pu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moon|moon]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-?-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moon|moon]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || pæ?i?ith || pæ?i?ij || pæ?i?ish || pæ?i?i
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || pa?u?u?uth || pa?u?u?uj || pa?u?u?ush || pa?u?u?u
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || pa?u?uth || pa?u?uj || pa?u?ush || pa?u?u
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || pa?uf?ufth || pa?uf?ufj || pa?uf?ufsh || pa?uf?uf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || pæ?e?eth || pæ?e?ej || pæ?e?esh || pæ?e?e
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || pa?o?o?oth || pa?o?o?oj || pa?o?o?osh || pa?o?o?o
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || pa?o?oth || pa?o?oj || pa?o?osh || pa?o?o
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || pa?of?ofth || pa?of?ofj || pa?of?ofsh || pa?of?of
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pæ?ïf?ïfth || pæ?ïf?ïfj || pæ?ïf?ïfsh || pæ?ïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pa?ïf?ïf?ïfth || pa?ïf?ïf?ïfj || pa?ïf?ïf?ïfsh || pa?ïf?ïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pa?ïf?ïfth || pa?ïf?ïfj || pa?ïf?ïfsh || pa?ïf?ïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pa?ïff?ïffth || pa?ïff?ïffj || pa?ïff?ïffsh || pa?ïff?ïff
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || pæ?æ?æth || pæ?æ?æj || pæ?æ?æsh || pæ?æ?æ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || pa?a?a?ath || pa?a?a?aj || pa?a?a?ash || pa?a?a?a
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || pa?a?ath || pa?a?aj || pa?a?ash || pa?a?a
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || pa?af?afth || pa?af?afj || pa?af?afsh || pa?af?af
|}

''64 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || pa?a?atha || pa?a?aja || pa?a?asha || pa?a?aka
|-
| [[Patient]] || pa?a?ath || pa?a?aj || pa?a?ash || pa?a?a
|-
| [[Possessive]] || pa?a?athal || pa?a?ajal || pa?a?ashal || pa?a?akal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || pa?a?aathatha || pa?a?aajaja || pa?a?aashasha || pa?a?aaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || pa?a?athan || pa?a?ajan || pa?a?ashan || pa?a?akan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || pa?a?athaoro || pa?a?ajaoro || pa?a?ashaoro || pa?a?akaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Irregular words]]
[[Category:Words 66806d6]]
[[Category:words 8d63c8d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d34c0b6}}
